Package battleship.view

Class ClientServerThread

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Thread
battleship.view.ClientServerThread
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class ClientServerThread extends Thread
This is a thread that can be either a client or a server. It automatically listens to new messages and either calls: Battleship.setEnemyName(String) if it receives the name of other player. This will be only by start. Battleship.setTurn() if it receives the String "TURN". After each turn, it has been sent to unlock the other side. Battleship.setWinnerText() if it receives the String "YOU". So the one side is winner and send other side information to set the Game Over too. Battleship.setEnemyCards(CardsG) if it receives the CardList of other side. This will be also occur one time at the beginning. Battleship.updateSelfCard(PlayedCardE) if it receives the updated card of own GameCard. When it is on enemyCard played, is this sent. Battleship.updateECardDefence(PlayedCardIO) if it receives the updated card information about the card of other side. When it is on own Card played, is this sent. If one side ended the game, that will end automatically for other side, with the method of System.exit()

    • run

      public void run()
      It automatically listens to new messages and either calls: * Battleship.setEnemyName(String) if it receives the name of other player. * Battleship.setTurn() if it receives the String "TURN". * Battleship.setWinnerText() if it receives the String "YOU". * Battleship.setEnemyCards(CardsG) if it receives the CardList of other side. * Battleship.updateSelfCard(PlayedCardE) if it receives the updated card of own GameCard. * Battleship.updateECardDefence(PlayedCardIO) if it receives the updated card information * about the card of other side.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Overrides:
      run in class Thread
